things.name: Qal'at al-Bahrain (Bahrain Fort)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage archaeological site with 4,000 years of civilisation, once capital of Dilmun

things.name: Bahrain National Museum
things.description: Dilmun civilisation artefacts and Bahraini culture spanning 6,000 years of history

things.name: Al-Fateh Grand Mosque
things.description: One of the world's largest mosques with a fibreglass dome and guided tours for non-Muslims

things.name: Manama Souq & Gold Souq
things.description: Traditional market with gold, pearls, spices and the famous Bab Al-Bahrain gateway

things.name: Bahrain International Circuit
things.description: Formula 1 Grand Prix circuit with museum, track tours and night race

things.name: Tree of Life
things.description: 400-year-old mesquite tree miraculously alive in the desert with no apparent water source

things.name: Bahrain Pearl Trail
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage pearling sites including the sea route and merchant palaces

things.name: Adhari Park
things.description: Bahrain's first theme park with rides, a falconry centre and natural freshwater spring

things.name: Muharraq Old Town
things.description: UNESCO-listed pearl merchant's houses with wind towers and the Shaikh Isa bin Ali House

things.name: Lost Paradise of Dilmun Water Park
things.description: Largest water park in the Gulf with wave pools, lazy river and family attractions
